title: Plush Turkish Stilton Pide
description: A buttery, bouncy pide topped with creamy vegan Stilton and zesty nuka-pickle for a satisfying solo dinner.
instructions: In a bowl mix the flour, yeast, and salt.
Add the warm water and olive oil and stir until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth.
Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rise in a warm place for 30 minutes.
Roll the dough into a 25 cm round and transfer it to a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Spread tomato paste over the dough, then arrange the vegan Stilton slices and chopped nuka-pickle on top. Sprinkle oregano, paprika, and a pinch of salt.
Bake for 15 minutes until the edges are golden and the cheese is melted.
Allow the pide to cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
